description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a formal business suit with a white shirt and a red tie. The figure has a headband and a distinctive hairstyle with medium-length hair tied back. Strapped across the back is an oversized, stylized sword with a rectangular blade and a circular cutout near the tip, reminiscent of fantasy or anime weaponry. The figure's arms are extended outward, and the hands are relaxed. The shoes are formal and match the business attire. The overall appearance combines urban professional style with a dramatic, fantasy-inspired accessory.
description: A male adult in a business suit with a headband and a large sword strapped to his back, blending urban professional and fantasy elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit, red tie, headband, and the sword's hilt over the right shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sword's thickness and the figure's tied-back hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length and width of the sword strapped across the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sword's blade profile and the figure's arm and hand details.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with a collared shirt and necktie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied back in a ponytail
